Every celebration, beautifully set. A perfect menu drawn from any tradition, composed entirely for you.

We cook across cuisines and continents. Eastern European roots, a modern New York table, and a menu shaped entirely around your celebration.

At the heart of the table

Carving

The Carving Table

Our signature meat-carving experience, served by hand to each guest.

Lox

Lox, Five Ways

A tableside flight of five house cures, sliced to order and served on ice.

Cocktails

Mixology

A roaming cocktail bar — spirits, infusions, and zero-proof pairings built to your evening.

Portrait of Chef David Teyf
CEO & EXECUTIVE CHEF

David Teyf

Le Cordon Bleu

Classically trained at Le Cordon Bleu and seasoned in the kitchens of New York, Chef David Teyf built Madison and Park on a simple belief — that hospitality is the truest luxury, and that a table should taste of where you come from and where you’re going.

As CEO and Executive Chef, his cooking moves freely across cuisines, anchored by craft: house-cured fish, hand-carved roasts, and a restless curiosity that lets every event read as entirely its own.
